title: Confirm issue #393 implementation scope
context: Issue #393 locks D1 join command, D2 byte-idempotent tracked manifest, and D3 team-shared RAG config. The repository rule also requires explicit owner confirmation before moving RAG persistence from local .paqad/.config to tracked .paqad/configs/.config.rag. Confirm the ticket as the implementation contract before source edits.

options.label: Implement all three scoped parts and the required tests/changeset, including the tracked RAG write-target move

rationale: Owner confirmed issue #393 as the implementation contract, including the tracked RAG write-target move.
